top_signals.title: Germany’s Exporters Helped Drive First-Quarter Growth Spurt
top_signals.summary: Germany’s export machine showed signs of life at the start of the year, combining with government spending to drive a spurt in growth before the Iran war hit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Former EF developer Dankrad Feist suggests $1 billion raise to form new Ethereum advocacy group
top_signals.summary: The Ethereum Foundation is a non-profit stewarding the development of the world's second-largest blockchain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Richemont Sales Up on Resilient Cartier Jewelry Demand
top_signals.summary: Richemont’s full-year sales rose more than expected as shoppers splurged on its pricey Cartier jewelry. Sales climbed 11% on a constant currency basis in the fiscal year ended in March, compared with the 9.78% estimate of analysts surveyed by Bloomberg. Bloomberg Opinion's Andrea Felsted has more. Her opinions are her own. (Source: Bloomberg)
